title: Quantifying lipids in human cells using Raman spectroscopy
author_string: Orzechowska, B. M., Nowakowska, A., Pieczara, A., Korona, W., Mateuszuk, L. et al.
abstract: Withdrawal statementThe authors have withdrawn this manuscript because they have identified several inaccuracies that require further refinement. Therefore, the authors do not wish this work to be cited as a reference for the project. If you have any questions, please contact the corresponding author.
